positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a majestic, celestial fox spirit (kitsune) seated gracefully on a stylized crescent moon. The fox should be rendered with clean, geometric lines and flowing, ethereal silhouette, colored in deep sapphire blue and soft gold accents. Surrounding the fox are stylized representations of swirling nebulae, crescent stars, and elegant floral elements (lotus and plum blossoms). The composition is centered and balanced, designed for high contrast print on dark fabric. Style: Japanese ukiyo-e meets modern line art, high-contrast flat vector graphic, suitable for seamless repeat background elements. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting emphasizing the outline. Color palette: Indigo, deep black, sapphire blue, gold leaf texture. --ar 1:1 --style vector --v 6.0
